RESOURCE MANAGER

⚠ CONFLICTS

🔗 SHARE SCHEDULE

Copy this link and send it to your team. Anyone opening the file from the same shared network drive will see your current schedule.

🚚 RIG MOVE

🚚 A Rig Move is a transit activity between two well jobs. It will appear on the Gantt as a striped green bar — drag edges to resize as usual.

🔧 PREP / BASE

🔧 A PREP period marks when a rig is in base being prepared for the next job. It appears on the Gantt as a grey striped bar.

Powered by RigBoard Pro · Fill in your unit prices above and click Submit Quote
📥 Import Supplier Quote Response

Paste the response link or hash you received from the supplier. Their unit prices will be imported into the current PO lines.

👥 Approver Contacts

Define the people who can approve Purchase Orders. Two roles are required: Operations and P&S (Procurement & Supply). These names and emails will be selectable in the PO editor when submitting for approval.

Name Email Role

Your Approval
Response submitted — send this link back to the requester

Copy the link above and send it back to the person who requested your approval. They will import it into RigBoard to update the PO status.

📥 Import Approval Response

Paste the approval response link sent back by the approver. The PO's approval status will be updated automatically.

Line Items — Enter actual quantities. Unit prices are locked to agreed PO rates.

Invoice submitted — next steps
  1. Click Export Invoice Reference PDF below
  2. Attach the PDF to your invoice
  3. Send your invoice (with PDF attached) to the client

Paste the invoice response link (or #poinvoicer=… hash) sent by the supplier. The invoice record will be created automatically in Finance ERP.
